  "claims": [
    "California has identified up to $870 million in BRIC-funded projects that will lose federal funding for hazard mitigation.",
    "Without this funding, communities across California face greater vulnerability to preventable disasters.",
    "California is entering the peak of wildfire season.",
    "AJR 11 calls for the restoration of federal disaster resilience funding that communities rely on to prevent and prepare for catastrophic wildfires.",
